case_title: CHASE BANK USA, N.A. VS. VI S. NGO et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT NGO, VI S. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-18-2011
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
DECLARATION RE: WAIVER OF ATTORNEY'S FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $393.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT NGO, VI S.
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.
DECLARATION RE: LOST ORIGINAL CONTRACT AND WAIVER OF EXCESS INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGO, VI S. $23,246.81 PRINCIPAL, $318.45 INTEREST, $393.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $23,958.26, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. SERVED JUL-27-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NGO, VI S.
